intro: Uncover the lie behind the crime.
description:
One explosion. Too many lies.
When a car bomb shakes 1950s San Viento, detective Javier Cruz must investigate the truth — while the city fights to bury it.
In Noire Police Detective: Gangster Drama Simulator, follow leads through neon-lit streets, motels, bars, warehouses, and ruined landmarks — and decide how far you’re willing to go to uncover the truth.
Use Detective Vision to reveal hidden clues, combine evidence in your case journal, and unlock new objectives or dialogue options. Stay quiet when danger is close: hide in shadows, distract guards, slip through back routes, and take down enemies silently. When stealth fails, you’ll rely on limited combat — close-quarters strikes and a six-shot revolver, where every bullet matters.
The case isn’t just about evidence — it’s about choices. Bribe a witness, destroy a document, protect a suspect, or expose the people in power. Your decisions shape relationships with key characters — a corrupt sheriff, a dangerous femme fatale, and an idealistic journalist — and lead to three possible endings: justice, corruption, or survival.

Key Features:
	•	Noir detective story set in a tense 1950s border city
	•	Detective Vision to uncover hidden clues and secrets
	•	Stealth gameplay: shadows, distractions, silent takedowns
	•	Environmental puzzles: safes, panels, locked routes, coded messages
	•	Moral choices that affect characters, missions, and the final outcome
	•	Semi-open locations with collectibles and optional areas

Truth has a price in San Viento. Will you expose the system — or become part of it?
